questions.question: Describe the main difference between the chalk and talk method and the PowerPoint presentation method in terms of engaging students and promoting effective learning. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the key aspects of each method

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using PowerPoint presentations in the classroom, particularly in terms of student engagement and learning outcomes? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider multiple perspectives and provide evidence to support your answer

questions.question: Explain how the chalk and talk method can be adapted to incorporate elements of game theory and strategic thinking, making it a more effective tool for teaching and learning. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Draw on concepts from game theory and provide examples or scenarios
